algorithms.name: Bell State
algorithms.description: Prepares the maximally entangled Bell state |Φ+⟩ = (|00⟩ + |11⟩) / √2 using a Hadamard gate to create superposition and a CNOT gate to entangle the qubits.

algorithms.name: GHZ State
algorithms.description: Prepares the maximally entangled GHZ state (|00...0⟩ + |11...1⟩) / √2. Demonstrates multipartite entanglement: all n qubits become perfectly correlated.

algorithms.name: Quantum Teleportation
algorithms.description: Transfers an arbitrary qubit state |ψ⟩ from Alice to Bob using a Bell pair and two classical bits.

state_angle.description: Ry angle (radians) to prepare Alice's qubit

algorithms.name: Grover's Search
algorithms.description: Grover's quantum search algorithm finds a marked item in an unsorted database quadratically faster than classical search.

algorithms.name: Deutsch-Jozsa
algorithms.description: Determines in one query whether a Boolean function is constant or balanced.

algorithms.name: Bernstein-Vazirani
algorithms.description: Recovers a hidden bitstring s from the function f(x) = s·x (mod 2) in a single query.

algorithms.name: Quantum Fourier Transform
algorithms.description: The quantum analogue of the discrete Fourier transform. A key subroutine in Shor's algorithm and quantum phase estimation.

algorithms.name: Quantum Phase Estimation
algorithms.description: Estimates the eigenphase φ of a unitary U acting on |ψ⟩ = |1⟩. Uses n counting qubits for precision.

algorithms.name: QAOA Max-Cut
algorithms.description: Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm applied to the Max-Cut problem. Finds a partition maximizing edges between partitions.

algorithms.name: VQE (Ising Z⊗Z)
algorithms.description: Variational Quantum Eigensolver for H = Z⊗Z. Explore how the energy landscape changes with the variational angle.

algorithms.name: Ising Trotter Evolution
algorithms.description: Simulates the transverse-field Ising model via first-order Trotterization. Watch entanglement entropy grow under coherent dynamics.

algorithms.name: Rabi Oscillations
algorithms.description: Simulates Rabi oscillations: a qubit driven by a resonant field oscillates between |0⟩ and |1⟩.

omega_dt.description: Rabi frequency × time step (radians per step)

algorithms.name: 3-Qubit Bit-Flip Code
algorithms.description: Demonstrates the 3-qubit bit-flip repetition code. A logical qubit is encoded, an error is injected, syndrome measurement identifies the fault, and correction restores the state.

state_angle.description: Ry angle to prepare logical qubit

error_qubit.description: Qubit to flip (0,1,2) or -1 for no error
